title: cneorum trimerum
intro: Cneorum trimerum, also known as the three-leaved cistus, is a shrubby perennial plant in the family Cistaceae, native to the Mediterranean region. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, which are attributed to its high concentration of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Cneorum trimerum include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and act as an antiseptic, making it a valuable herb in traditional medicine. Cneorum trimerum can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and it is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
